long_description:
- This is continuation of INC10511663
- We noticed some errors in razee pods (mzone736) and we have paged SDN team
Incident source: https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C0A3ADZL37A - Alex Ntotsikas (IaaS CORE)
short_description: Noticed errors in razee pods - DAL Staging
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: Noticed errors in razee pods - DAL Staging
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: - We are still seeing timeout errors in the logs of razee pods. 
- I agreed with Yacine and Dean to close the INC and continue tomorrow the investigation
- There is no impact as part of this issue.
Signature of Issue: Noticed errors in razee pods - DAL Staging
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: 
Category/Subcategory: other
Timeline Summary: See thread:
https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C0A3ADZL37A

- We moved the razee pods to a new node
- We deleted the kube-proxy pods of the master nodes
But the above steps did not solve the issue
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed
Caused by Change/Incident: 
Warroom: https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C0A3ADZL37A
Meeting URL: 
Outage Start: 
Outage End:
